## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and this change meets the **quality bar** stated there: no `any`; no `// TODO` / `FIXME`; no `console.log` / `println!` / `dbg!` in production code; no inline CSS; production-ready.
- [ ] My commits carry a **`Signed-off-by`** trailer (the [DCO](https://developercertificate.org/) — *requested, not required*; `git commit -s`).
- [ ] My contribution is my own work, or is compatibly licensed for inbound **MIT** (inbound = outbound; no CLA, no copyright assignment).
- [ ] This PR does **not** report a security vulnerability (those go through [private advisory reporting](https://github.com/Ne-IA/convertia/security/advisories/new) — see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md)).
